{{Item
| image = Spotted collar.png
| id = spotted_collar
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Spotted Collar''' is a non-dyable equipable item that stylizes your dog's collar.

[[File:Spotted_collar_display.png|frameless|606x606px]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| [[Wool Collar]] <br>+ Black Dye<br>+ White Dye<br>+ String
| [[File:Spotted collar crafting.gif]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Trivia ==
It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
